scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install; npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 6002"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 6002"
